verses.text: This third time I come; 'in the mouth of two or three witnesses' every word is established; I will not spare. Fair warning. He will deal firmly with the unrepentant.
This third time I come; 'in the mouth of two or three witnesses' every word is established; I will not spare. Fair warning. He will deal firmly with the unrepentant.
Ye seek a proof of Christ in me; He was 'crucified through weakness, yet... liveth by the power of God.' Power in weakness. Christ's pattern is his own.
Ye seek a proof of Christ in me; He was 'crucified through weakness, yet... liveth by the power of God.' Power in weakness. Christ's pattern is his own.
'Examine yourselves, whether ye be in the faith'; know ye not that Christ is in you? Self-test. Each must prove his own faith.
'Examine yourselves, whether ye be in the faith'; know ye not that Christ is in you? Self-test. Each must prove his own faith.
I pray ye do no evil; 'we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.' For the truth. He labours only for what is right.
I pray ye do no evil; 'we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.' For the truth. He labours only for what is right.
We are glad when we are weak and ye strong; I write that I use not sharpness. Loving aim. His goal is their building up, not their punishment.
We are glad when we are weak and ye strong; I write that I use not sharpness. Loving aim. His goal is their building up, not their punishment.
Be perfect, of good comfort, of one mind; 'the God of love and peace shall be with you.' Final charge. He leaves them with the promise of God's presence.
Be perfect, of good comfort, of one mind; 'the God of love and peace shall be with you.' Final charge. He leaves them with the promise of God's presence.
'The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the communion of the Holy Ghost, be with you all.' The benediction. He closes with the Triune blessing.
'The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the communion of the Holy Ghost, be with you all.' The benediction. He closes with the Triune blessing.
